title: Australian Biscuit Crumble
description: A simple yet delicious dessert recipe combining crunchy biscuit crumbs with a sweet crumble topping.
instructions: Crush the digestive biscuits in a food processor until they resemble breadcrumbs.
Mix the biscuit crumbs with sugar and cinnamon (if using).
In a separate bowl, melt the butter.
Combine the melted butter with the biscuit mixture and mix until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with crumble.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
